about.label: About
about.p1: I build user-friendly applications across the stack — from front-end (TypeScript, React, Angular, Vue) to back-end (Python, FastAPI).
about.p2: Leveraging Azure services such as OpenAI, Document Intelligence, SQL Server, Storage Account and Entra ID, I also provide consulting on infrastructure, architecture design, and AI/IoT solutions.
about.p3: My goal is to deliver value from both the technical and the business side.

works.label: Selected Works
works.sub: Personal and POXCON organization projects on GitHub

items.fine-group-solution: Corporate solution platform built under the POXCON organization
items.miharashi-official: Official website for the Miharashi drive-in
items.invoice-search: Invoice consistency checker powered by Japan's NTA API
items.multiple-ai-chatbot: Chat with multiple AI models side by side
items.steam-dedicated-server-client: Desktop client for building and managing Steam dedicated servers
